author: lOrm
content: Delivered: tests/web_integration.rs — 27 passing tests, 2 browser-gated #[ignore] tests. All 5 spec behaviors covered. 4 gap issues pinned with comments referencing #603, #605, #608, #610. No production code changed. cargo build, cargo test, cargo clippy --tests (for new file — 0 new errors), cargo fmt --check all pass.
